descriptionHtml:
Fountaine Pajot Venezia 42 for sale 1994 | 4 Guest Cabins + 2 Crew Cabins | Tax Paid

The Fountaine Pajot Venezia 42 for sale 1994 represents a proven model in the world of cruising catamarans, known for comfort, stability, and long-range cruising potential. This particular vessel, flagged in Poland, is in good condition, benefitting from regular upgrades and attentive maintenance (Bimini, Raymarine Instruments, Code 0, Gennaker...). The Fountaine Pajot Venezia 42 for sale 1994 remains a popular choice for families, blue water sailors, and anyone looking for generous living space and reliable performance.

Cockpit & Deck Equipment 

  • Sprayhood: Yes
  • Bimini: Yes (new, 2025)
  • Cockpit table: Yes (fibreglass)
  • Winter cover: Yes
  • Complete cockpit enclosures: Yes (new in 2023)
  • Seacocks: Randex Marine
  • Water alarms: Abus detectors with alarms in each hull

Accommodation & Interior

  • Double cabins: 4
  • Crew cabins: 2
  • Dinette berths: 1
  • Bathrooms: 2 (shower boxes within bathrooms, not separate)
  • Interior wood: Stained walnut
  • Stove: Gas + electric
  • Oven: Gas
  • Refrigeration: 12V system + Frigoboat fridge

Engines & Propulsion

  • Number of engines: 2
  • Engine brand: Yanmar
  • Model: 3GM30F
  • Power: 27 hp each
  • Year: 1994
  • Engine hours: 8000 (port), 5000 (starboard) as of April 2025
  • Last overhaul: 2022
  • Fuel tank capacity: 350 L
  • Transmission: SD 20
  • Propellers: Kiwi Prop (2023) + two fixed 2-blade props
  • Steering: Wheel with midship brakes
  • Alternator: STerling ProReg B regulator on port alternator

Navigation & Electronics

  • Autopilot: EV200 with P70s display
  • VHF: Fixed Icom M323 DSC + portable ICOM IC-M7 MRC
  • Tridata instrument: Yes
  • Chartplotter: Axiom 7” at helm
  • Wind instrument: Yes
  • Navigation package: Raymarine (2024) including multi i70s, autopilot, wind, transducers, Axiom 7”
  • All navigation info repeated on a 2024 Lenovo TV screen in dinette; autopilot and Axiom can be controlled from here
  • Updated Mediterranean electronic charts

Utilities & Services

  • Voltage: 12V
  • Water tanks: 2 (connected), steel, total capacity 600 L
  • Bilge pumps: 6 total (2 per hull, 2 for engines)
  • Heating: Webasto 5 kW
  • Battery chargers: 2 Victron 25A each, WiFi enabled
  • Boiler: 80 L (connected to starboard engine, fully insulated, heating element replaced in 2024)
  • Pressurised water system: With expansion tank
  • Black water tank: Yes (connected to port head)
  • External shower: Yes

Rigging & Sails

  • Mast: 17 m aluminium with trapezes (catamaran rig)
  • Bowsprit: 2 m aluminium
  • Winches: 7 total (6 Lewmar 44 stainless steel, 1 Lewmar 40 at mast)
  • Lazy bag: Yes
  • Furling headsail: Goiot
  • Sails:
    • Mainsail: Dacron reinforced, 58.8 m²
    • Headsail: Dacron, 28 m²
    • Code 0 laminated, 72 m² (2024) with sock and continuous line furler
    • Gennaker, 122 m² (2020)

Tender & Anchoring

  • Tender: Avon Rib 340
  • Outboard: Evinrude 4 dv 2-stroke
  • Windlass: Goiot 312
  • Anchors: Main CQR (2024), secondary CQR, Danforth backup
  • Chain: 80 m (new 2024)
  • Mooring lines: Yes
  • Life raft: Oceanic, 12 person, unlimited navigation (hard case, requires inspection)
  • Fenders: 8 + 2 ball fenders

The Fountaine Pajot Venezia 42 for sale 1994 is appealing for anyone looking for a solid cruiser in good condition, ready for extended passages or comfortable life aboard. For further details or to arrange a viewing, please contact us!
